## [Add]

- Add MySQL 5.7 compatibility handling for newer Linux targets, including libxcrypt compatibility probing and a bundled Rocky Linux 9 ncurses compatibility fallback.

## [Change]

- Resolve MySQL Server package metadata per target host so mixed operating system deployments can prepare the required package set from the support matrix.
- Relax the single-node deployment network-interface alias guard so concurrent standalone deployments across mixed lab hosts do not fail on harmless interface-name differences.

## [Fix]

- Fix MySQL fast-login setup so the generated expect script is owned by the MySQL OS user, can be executed through privilege switching, and is removed after the attempt.
- Fix local archive preparation so an existing valid package with a matching checksum is reused instead of being downloaded again.
- Fix MySQL package verification to run with the effective per-host support metadata during parallel deployments.
